value.body:
## Context

The roadmap and product planning model need parent work items with visible child progress, blocked state, and updates.

## Outcome

Epic pages show child tickets, status breakdown, progress, recent updates, and linked roadmap notes.

## Acceptance criteria

- Epic detail shows child tickets grouped by status and type.
- Progress derives from child completion and shows counts by state.
- Users can add/remove child relationships from the UI.
- Initiative/progress API behavior remains compatible with existing contracts or is migrated through schema-first changes.
- Tests cover relationship updates and progress calculation.

frontmatter.title: Add epic hierarchy and progress pages

value.title: Add epic hierarchy and progress pages
